Interface BulkOperation.UpdateFirst

All Superinterfaces:
BulkOperation, BulkOperation.Update
Enclosing interface:
BulkOperation
public static interface BulkOperation.UpdateFirst extends BulkOperation.Update
Update-one operation: update the first document matching the BulkOperation.Update.query().
Since:
5.1
Author:
Christoph Strobl
